name: Pranil Belge
title: Software Developer
summary: Full-stack Software Developer focused on building clean, performance-optimized, and scalable web solutions. Skilled in modern JavaScript frameworks, TypeScript, and cloud services, with a strong background in combining AI models with web interfaces to deliver seamless user experiences.

meta.title: Pranil Belge | Software Developer Portfolio
meta.description: Explore Software Developer projects, certifications, and experience of Pranil Belge, specializing in React, TypeScript, and AI integrations.

projects.title: Election Guide AI
projects.description: An AI-powered political advisor and voter information platform that provides non-partisan answers on election candidates, policies, and voting procedures.
achievements: Leveraged Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to serve accurate candidate policy positions.
Engineered smooth, responsive Framer Motion UI capable of low-latency chat streaming.
projects.problemSolved: Voters struggle to find unbiased, consolidated policy stances for local and national election candidates.
projects.learnings: Mastered handling real-time LLM streaming events and context-window optimization to prevent AI hallucinations.

projects.title: Dragon Repeller RPG
projects.description: An immersive, text-based action-adventure RPG featuring dynamic inventory management, merchant exchanges, and logic-driven turn-based combat encounters.
achievements: Implemented state-management structure entirely in vanilla JavaScript.
Integrated dynamic procedurally-generated game text narratives.
projects.problemSolved: Designed a lightweight, browser-based gaming engine that requires no massive asset downloads and runs at 60 FPS on any device.
projects.learnings: Drawn deep insights into clean state management, keyboard event handling, and game loop timing in JavaScript.

projects.title: Responsive Portfolio
projects.description: A high-performance personal developer portfolio demonstrating fluid fluid-grid systems, glassmorphism UI/UX design, and elegant animations.
achievements: Obtained 95+ scores on Lighthouse audits for Performance, SEO, and Accessibility.
Responsive across all break-points from small mobile screens to 4K displays.
projects.problemSolved: Created a lightweight personal showcase with micro-interactions that communicate skills dynamically without heavy payload assets.
projects.learnings: Explored custom Tailwind utilities, hardware-accelerated CSS properties, and SVG layout design.

projects.title: Google Ads Analytics
projects.description: A developer-focused performance reporting engine that retrieves Google Ads API metrics, builds interactive campaigns charts, and detects budget anomalies.
achievements: Optimized API polling with a server-side caching layer, reducing API quota exhaustion by 60%.
Created an automated email alert system using SendGrid for underperforming campaigns.
projects.problemSolved: Marketers struggled to quickly visualize campaign trends and spot cost anomalies across hundreds of ad groups.
projects.learnings: Worked closely with OAuth2 flows, token refresh cycles, and complex time-series aggregation algorithms.

experience.description: Spearheaded frontend component creation and API integrations for client applications.
achievements: Refactored legacy React applications to TypeScript, decreasing runtime exceptions by 35%.
Cooperated with UI/UX design teams to establish reusable design system libraries, shortening UI coding cycles.

experience.description: Collaborated on testing, debugging, and adding features to React and Node.js-based SaaS backends.
achievements: Wrote 80+ unit tests with Jest, increasing project test coverage from 65% to 88%.
Accelerated page load times by implementing lazy loading for large project modules.

hackathons.name: Global WebDev Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built a responsive election tracker under 48 hours serving localized voter advice.
